roles.name: Washerwoman
roles.summary: Night 1: identify one of two players as a Townsfolk.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：获知两名玩家中有一位是某个镇民。
roles.detail: Start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Townsfolk.
roles.chineseDetail: 说书人向你展示一个具体镇民角色，并指出两名玩家，其中一人拥有该角色。

roles.name: Librarian
roles.summary: Night 1: identify one of two players as an Outsider (or that there are no Outsiders).
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：获知两名玩家中有一位是外来者，或本局没有外来者。
roles.detail: Show a signal 0 when no Outsider is present; otherwise show one Outsider in play.
roles.chineseDetail: 若场上没有外来者，可直接给出 0；否则指出两名玩家，其中一人是外来者。

roles.name: Investigator
roles.summary: Night 1: learn one of two players is a Minion.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：获知两名玩家中有一位是某个爪牙。
roles.detail: Start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Minion.
roles.chineseDetail: 说书人指出两名玩家，其中一人是某个指定爪牙。

roles.name: Chef
roles.summary: Night 1: learn how many neighbouring pairs of evil players exist.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：获知相邻邪恶玩家对的数量。
roles.detail: Shows the number of adjacent evil player pairs.
roles.chineseDetail: 结果是相邻座位中邪恶玩家相邻成对的总数。

roles.name: Empath
roles.summary: Each night: learn how many living evil neighbours you have.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：获知你左右两侧存活邻座中邪恶玩家的数量。
roles.detail: Shows how many of your two alive neighbours are evil.
roles.chineseDetail: 只统计当前存活的左右邻座，结果会受中毒或醉酒影响。

roles.name: Fortune Teller
roles.summary: Each night: choose 2 players and learn if either is a Demon. There is a good player that registers as a Demon to you.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择两名玩家，获知其中是否有恶魔。有一名善良玩家始终被你视为恶魔。
roles.detail: Point at two players and get a yes/no answer if one is the Demon. One good player always registers as a Demon to you.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚点两人，若其中包含恶魔，则回答是。有一名善良玩家始终被你视为恶魔。

roles.name: Undertaker
roles.summary: Each night: if someone was executed today, learn the executed player's character.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：若今天有人被处决，获知该玩家的真实角色。
roles.detail: Reveal a dead player character only after an execution.
roles.chineseDetail: 只有当天真的发生处决时才会得到信息。

roles.name: Monk
roles.summary: Each night except the first: choose another player to protect from the Demon tonight.
roles.chineseSummary: 除首夜外每晚：选择另一名玩家，本夜不被恶魔杀死。
roles.detail: The chosen player (not yourself) does not die if the Demon attacks them tonight.
roles.chineseDetail: 被保护者当夜不会被恶魔杀死，但仍可能受其他效果影响。

roles.name: Ravenkeeper
roles.summary: If you die at night, choose one player and learn their character.
roles.chineseSummary: 若你夜里死亡：选择一名玩家并获知其角色。
roles.detail: Activate only if the Ravenkeeper died during this night.
roles.chineseDetail: 只有夜里死亡后才会觉醒，并查看一名玩家的真实角色。

roles.name: Virgin
roles.summary: The 1st time you are nominated, if the nominator is a Townsfolk, the nominator dies.
roles.chineseSummary: 第一次被提名时：若提名者是镇民，则立即触发处决效果。
roles.detail: Day mechanic: if a Townsfolk nominates you for the first time, that Townsfolk is executed immediately.
roles.chineseDetail: 首次被提名时触发；具体执行由说书人依规则裁定。

roles.name: Slayer
roles.summary: Once per game, choose during day and execute a player if they are the Demon.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次：白天指定一名玩家，若其是恶魔则立刻死亡。
roles.detail: Single-use daytime shot; if wrong, Slayer is spent and the game continues.
roles.chineseDetail: 若目标不是恶魔，则技能消耗但游戏继续。

roles.name: Soldier
roles.summary: Safe from the Demon's kill each night.
roles.chineseSummary: 恶魔在夜里无法杀死你。
roles.detail: The Demon's selected night target cannot be this player.
roles.chineseDetail: 恶魔的直接击杀对你无效。

roles.name: Mayor
roles.summary: If 3 players remain and no execution happens, good wins.
roles.chineseSummary: 若仅剩 3 人且白天无人被处决，则善良阵营获胜。
roles.detail: If 3 players remain and mayor survives with no execution, good wins.
roles.chineseDetail: 终局 3 人时若白天无人被处决，可直接判善良获胜。

roles.name: Butler
roles.summary: Each night, choose a Master; tomorrow you may only vote if your master votes too.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚选择一名主人；次日只有在主人投票时你才能投票。
roles.detail: Choose one player each night (not yourself) as your master.
roles.chineseDetail: 主人不能是自己；次日投票时必须与主人同步。

roles.name: Drunk
roles.summary: You think you are a Townsfolk character, but you are not.
roles.chineseSummary: 你以为自己是镇民，但实际上你不是。
roles.detail: Player sees a fake Townsfolk role; no direct ability.
roles.chineseDetail: 你可能被当作某个镇民处理，但真实身份始终是酒鬼。

roles.name: Recluse
roles.summary: You might register as evil & as a Minion or Demon, even if dead.
roles.chineseSummary: 你可能被登记为邪恶阵营、爪牙或恶魔，即使已死亡。
roles.detail: The Storyteller chooses what you register as whenever you are targeted by a detection ability. You do not gain that character's ability.
roles.chineseDetail: 每当你被侦测类能力选为目标时，说书人决定你登记为什么角色/阵营。你不会获得该角色的能力。

roles.name: Saint
roles.summary: If you die by execution, your team loses.
roles.chineseSummary: 若你因白天处决而死，善良阵营立刻输掉游戏。
roles.detail: If executed, evil team wins instantly.
roles.chineseDetail: 若因白天处决死亡，立即判定邪恶阵营胜利。

roles.name: Poisoner
roles.summary: Each night, choose one player and poison them until dawn.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家，使其能力在天亮前失效。
roles.detail: Poisoned players skip their night action and can still survive the night.
roles.chineseDetail: 中毒持续到黎明，目标信息和能力可被说书人误导或无效。

roles.name: Spy
roles.summary: Each night, you see the Grimoire. You might register as good & as a Townsfolk or Outsider, even if dead.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：查看魔典。你可能被登记为善良阵营、镇民或外来者，即使已死亡。
roles.detail: The Storyteller chooses what you register as whenever you are targeted by a detection ability. You do not gain that character's ability.
roles.chineseDetail: 每当你被侦测类能力选为目标时，说书人决定你登记为什么角色/阵营。你不会获得该角色的能力。

roles.name: Scarlet Woman
roles.summary: If the Demon dies and >=5 players are alive, you become the Demon.
roles.chineseSummary: 若恶魔死亡且场上至少 5 人存活，你转变为新的恶魔。
roles.detail: Passive. If the Demon dies while 5 or more players live, you automatically become the Demon.
roles.chineseDetail: 若小恶魔死亡且存活人数足够，你会在当夜或结算时转为恶魔。

roles.name: Baron
roles.summary: There are two additional Outsiders in play.
roles.chineseSummary: 本局额外加入 2 名外来者。
roles.detail: Adds two extra Outsider slots, replacing two Townsfolk slots.
roles.chineseDetail: 额外外来者会替换原本的镇民席位。

roles.name: Imp
roles.summary: Each night, choose one player to die. If you die yourself, a Minion becomes Imp.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家死亡；若你死亡，则一名爪牙成为新的小恶魔。
roles.detail: If the Imp dies, a living Minion becomes the new demon.
roles.chineseDetail: 通常每晚杀一人；若自己死亡，可能由一名存活爪牙接任。
